description: Authoritative source of gateway file paths and allowed import patterns. Consumed by ci.js and domain-isolation.test.js to enforce the gateway pattern consistently. Domain-tier packages (rex, sourcevision) are not listed here because they do not import from sibling or upper-tier packages — their isolation is enforced by domain-isolation.test.js instead. Foundation-tier imports (@n-dx/llm-client) are intentionally ungated: foundation is the bottom of the hierarchy, designed for direct use by all tiers.

internalBarrels.description: Sole public surface for the viewer messaging subsystem — must remain re-export-only

boundaries.message: server/ must not import from viewer/ (use gateway or shared types)
